p_blood_group_B.description: The probability that a single donor has blood group B.

n_donors.description: The number of unrelated blood donors (sample size), each providing one pint of blood.

P_X_0.description: The probability of obtaining 0 pints of group B blood from 100 donors, used in the summation.

P_X_1.description: The probability of obtaining 1 pint of group B blood from 100 donors, used in the summation.

P_X_2.description: The probability of obtaining 2 pints of group B blood from 100 donors, used in the summation.
